title: Long Jump
excerpt: A Long Jump is the horizontal branch of the broader jumping rules. It resolves through Strength-based jump distance, movement expenditure, and any terrain or landing checks tied to the destination.
markdown: # Long Jump A Long Jump is the horizontal form of Jumping. Resolve it through the broader Jumping rules, which establish how Strength, movement cost, and running start determine the leap. The landing still matters: a jump into Difficult Terrain or another unstable surface can turn the outcome into a balance or recovery problem, including the risk of ending Prone.
